CREATE DICTIONARY regexp_dict( regexp String, tag String) PRIMARY KEY(regexp) SOURCE(YAMLRegExpTree(PATH '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/regexp_tree.yaml')) LAYOUT(regexp_tree);
CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT dictGetAll('regexp_dict', 'tag', (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1));
WITH (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS temp_value SELECT dictGetAll('regexp_dict', 'tag', temp_value);
SELECT dictGetAll('regexp_dict', 'tag', id_expr) FROM (SELECT id_expr FROM (SELECT value AS id_expr FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS subquery) AS outer_query;
SELECT dictGetAll('regexp_dict', 'tag', 'test', 1) UNION ALL SELECT dictGetAll('regexp_dict', 'tag', 'value', 3);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT dictGetAll('regexp_dict', 'tag', (SELECT value FROM temp_table WHERE id = 1)) AS result;
